'''ladhuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okapana|okapana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okapana|okapana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ladhuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || lædhijith || lædhijij || lædhijish || lædhiji
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ladhudhujuth || ladhudhujuj || ladhudhujush || ladhudhuju
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ladhujuth || ladhujuj || ladhujush || ladhuju
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ladhufjufth || ladhufjufj || ladhufjufsh || ladhufjuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ladhujuthu || ladhujuju || ladhujushu || ladhujuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || ladhujuth || ladhujuj || ladhujush || ladhuju
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ladhujuthul || ladhujujul || ladhujushul || ladhujukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ladhujuuthuthu || ladhujuujuju || ladhujuushushu || ladhujuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || ladhujuthun || ladhujujun || ladhujushun || ladhujukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ladhujuthuoro || ladhujujuoro || ladhujushuoro || ladhujukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
